message:
test(fcp-mesh): add tests for gossip symbol validation and transport RTT preference

Adds two new tests to improve coverage:

gossip.rs:
- mesh_gossip_handle_request_rejects_invalid_symbol_request: Verifies that
  gossip requests exceeding MAX_OBJECT_IDS_PER_REQUEST for symbols are
  rejected with empty responses. This prevents resource exhaustion from
  malicious peers sending oversized symbol requests.

transport.rs:
- best_path_prefers_lower_rtt_when_same_priority: Verifies that when
  multiple paths have the same transport kind (and thus same priority),
  the selector prefers the path with lower RTT. This ensures optimal
  path selection within a priority tier.

Both tests validate edge cases in the mesh networking layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
